description: Search for YAML configurations, code examples, and deployment patterns from EDOT and OTel repositories. Use when the user needs concrete configuration snippets or implementation references.

configuration.query: FROM edot-kb-github METADATA _score | WHERE (MATCH(code_semantic, ?query) OR MATCH(body_semantic, ?query)) AND content_type IN ("yaml_config", "code_example", "config", "example", "readme", "repository") | KEEP title, body, url, repo, language_sdk, content_type, _score | SORT _score DESC | LIMIT 5

query.description: The user's search query for configuration or code examples
